text: `on_channels_changed` is fed each observe tick → the derived h-tag set corrects join/leave (fixes stale-h-tags). `mark_dead`/session-end teardown calls `on_session_ended` **before** `mark_dead`, ordered, publishing a final expiring 30315. Nothing publishes directly; the durable outbox is the single executor. [...] test reconcile::status::tests::channel_leave_corrects_h_tags ... ok
